title: Git & GitHub
summary: A cumulative developer-tools path from trustworthy local history through parallel branch work and complete pull-request collaboration.

milestones.outcome: Build, inspect, clean, and hand off a meaningful local repository history.
Isolate parallel work, merge safely, resolve conflicts, and recover without erasing history.
Publish branches, synchronize remotes, and complete an issue-to-review-to-merge collaboration cycle.
